transcript.text:
(Looks amazing)
(Overwhelming appearance...) It looks amazing
(Amazing thickness)
(Never seen pork like this before...) It's so thick, amazing
('Majangdong Kimssi' that can't be compared)
(Amazed by the pork that's on a different level...!)
(The thickness of the spotted pig)
(Can't help but be surprised at the new world taste)
It's so juicy
(It will make you forget about the pork you've eaten so far) It's the best pork I've ever had
(Seocho-dong, Seocho-gu, Seoul)
Hello, everyone
I came to eat pork belly
after a long time
But this pork belly meat is not common in Korea
(Not just pig, but spotted pig...?) It's pork belly made by aging spotted pig

I've never heard of spotted pigs before
So I'm curious about how it'll taste
Let's head inside
(The new world of pork, 'Majangdong Kimssi')
Wow, the grill is made by a mold
Wow, it's been a while since I saw a grill like this
(Menu) Thank you
(A variety of set menus) There are assorted sets
What's good here?
('Majangdong Kimssi' main menu) Pork belly and pork shoulder are the best
(A set menu is recommended when it's hard to decide!) And most people order the set
(Majangdong Kimssi) Then, I'll have the large assorted Majangdong,
3 pork belly, 3 pork cheek,
and 2 whole pork belly
Which stew...
is popular?

We have...
blue crab doenjang-jjigae that we cook with 100 blue crabs
It's very deep in flavor and delicious
This Haenam ripe kimchi-jjigae
is made with ripe kimchi from Haenam
(Tzuyang's pick) I'll get the doenjang-jjigae
(I don't know if it's enough for you...) It might not be enough
(I'll order more if it's not enough) I'll eat this first and then...
(Even the color is different)
(Beautifully presented pork)
(Plentiful)
(Its thickness is overwhelming...)
I can eat up to here but not this...
(No way) You can't eat all that
(Nope) I can't, huh?
(Nope) I don't think you can

(There's something special here...)
(The meat has arrived)
Do you want to take a photo or a video?
(Feels like I have to haha) Yes, I will!
A video!
1, 2, 3!
(What a fancy appearance..!)
(It's truly an amazing performance) It looks amazing
(The rest of the meat comes in a fancy way too) Thank you
I don't think you'll be able to finish it all....
(Even a group can't finish this amount...) This is hard for a group to finish
Wow, the meat is so thick
The length of 2 finger joints
(It's beautifully presented like a gourmet dish) And it looks like beef, the garnish too
Do you usually grill for the customers?
We do it all...!

- Oh really? - We grill all of the meat
(Perfectly cooked by the staff) It'd be very convenient while eating
(Here we go!) It's so thick, amazing
(Spotted pig with its amazing thickness)
- They're cutting scissors - That's right
(Since they grill it for you, there's no way it can burn...!)
(Ready)
There's a serving plate over there
You can put the salt on the serving plate
(British Maldon salt without MSG) That salt is British Maldon salt
(Special salt!) It's been approved by the British royal family
Try the first piece
(The glorious first piece!) with the Maldon salt
(The glorious first piece!) Thank you
(Eyes of respect)
It's amazing..!

(Eyes are rolling back because it's so delicious lol) Can I eat this?
- I'll give you pork shoulder! - Oh, pork shoulder!
(Pork shoulder goes well) Try the pork shoulder with
(with Thai fish sauce) the Thai fish sauce that's in the middle
Wow...!
Because the pork is from spotted pig,
(Mixed with three species) it's a 3-way cross between
(Domestic spotted pig) white, black, and brown pig
(National production) It's one of the top 0.3 percent of Korean breeds
Do you usually tell people this?
Oh yes!
I explain the salt and then the pig
It tastes better when you know about it
A little bit of salt
Wasabi
It's better than beef!

Thank you.. Haha
(Hehe)
And lastly,
(Meat with seaweed...?) you can wrap the meat in seaweed
(Can't imagine the taste...) With seaweed?
(Can't imagine the taste...) Yes
(On the grill)
- Oh roasted? - Yes
We roast it for you!
(Gangwon-do fermented squid that goes well with seaweed) Add a lot of ferment squid
- A lot? - Yes
- This much? - You can add a lot, it's not salty
(+ Wasabi) It's really good when you wrap it like that
(Thank you for your kind explanation) Thank you
I couldn't explain the taste earlier because he was here
but this is just insane!

You can feel the juices pop out as soon as you take a bite
It's not dry or tough at all, it's nice and chewy
(I dare say it's the best!) It's the best pork I've ever had
What's more amazing is that the pork shoulder is delicious too
It's not dry at all
It's just nice and chewy...!
I usually don't eat pork shoulder because it's dry
This is so delicious
So juicy!
I should've ordered more pork shoulder...
This...
This set comes with pork skin too
(Pork skin to finish up) It looks interesting like this
Again
Personally, the meat itself
(Crying because it's so good) is so delicious

Should I try the baek-kimchi?
(Every side dish is special) This is rinsed Haenam kimchi
It's so juicy
Ta-da!
(Excited because it's so delicious lol)
Is it good?
Thank you haha
(Next meat)
(Doenjang-jjigae is here) Wow, cute
(Blue crab doenjang-jjigae looks amazing) Thank you, the earthen pot is so cute
Wow, the crabs are big
(Completely filled crab..!) All the meat is in there
(Round 2 gets grilled while I give doenjang-jjigae a taste)
(Juicy pork neck and pork cheek)
The grill must be very hot, it cooks so fast
Yes, that's right!

We cook it in high heat
(Moist and juicy meat cooked on high heat) to keep the meat nice and juicy
(Pork neck)
It's so delicious...!
(Pork neck that's as good as beef) The texture is like beef
(Ready) Thank you
I ate the pork neck earlier
The pork neck is good since the pork belly and pork shoulder is good
(Pork cheek)
Why is it so chewy? So delicious
I don't really like pork cheek
but it's different to what I know so I'm kinda confused
It's so delicious
My tomato!
I love it!
(Special combinations so that I wouldn't get sick of it)

This place
has really delicious meat
(Can eat without worrying) but I love that they grill it for you so it's convenient
(Kind service) I always had a hard time grilling meat
They have some lockers over there
It's so interesting
(They provide lockers) There's a space to store your clothes
(to prevent your clothes from smelling) so I think that's great
The barbecue smell...
(Would by a barbecue scent perfume) I like it
(Doenjang-jjigae)
This is really
a must!
It's full of meat
(Make sure to breathe while eating...)
Flip!

(It's better now that it's heated up again)
There's a lot of meat so don't worry and enjoy it!
(Suddenly...?) Thank you... Haha
I'll have more if this is not enough haha
The staff...
should come here for a company dinner
(Staff: Hurrayyyyy!!)
Oh but is this place too far? Haha
(Staff: ...)
But I'm kinda bummed since
(Can't forget about the pork shoulder) the pork shoulder was so good earlier...
I want half of this to be pork shoulder...
Because I enjoyed the pork shoulder so much,
I got the pork cheek and pork belly packed
(Ordered pork shoulder!) And I got the pork shoulder of the same weight
Looks delicious

Wow, the marbling
(Amazing thickness...) The thickness looks like beef...
(Let's go for round 3)
(Looks nice and tender)
(Look at that juice!)
(It's melting... Save me...)
(Ah hot)
Wow, I'm just as touched as the first time I tried this
It's so delicious
(Ready) Enjoy
I kinda want to eat it with something
Salted squid fried rice? That sounds delicious!
(Can't leave out rice when eating meat) Can I get a fried rice?
If I had to rank them...
(It will be...)
(Gave up) I can't choose

(While being touched by the juiciness...)
(The salted squid fried rice got made)
(Fried rice is here) It's already here? Thank you
2 eggs... Is it usually 2?
That's actually...
a double yolk egg!
Really?!
I've never seen that before
(Taean Marinated Crab: 13.95 million views) (It's worth 10 million won if you get a double yolk egg..!)
This is a double yolk egg, right?
What?
(It's hard to experience this) Is it because I eat a lot of food?
(But experienced it twice..) I got another double yolk egg
(Full of luck, full of flavor...!) It's a double yolk egg, but the yolk is not small
(Generous amount of salted squid fried rice) I'll give it a try, there's a lot
It's delicious!

Ah, this would go
perfectly with the meat
With this too
(Reheated doenjang-jjigae) Thank you, there's more soup
When you go to a barbecue place,
the meat is very important
(Side dishes are essential) but it's also important to have other sides
(to prevent getting sick of the taste) that balance out everything
(The sides are doing a great job) It's not greasy at all
It'd be good to wrap the rice in seaweed
(Immediate execution)
(The seaweed combo goes well with the meat)
Oh, it's nicely roasted!
With rice
(Perfectly seasoned) Since it's salted squid fried rice, it goes really well with meat
Mini kimbap!

(The meat disappeared in an instant because of the fried rice...)
Next...
I have the pork skin left
I'll eat the pork skin with...
There was naengmyeon on the menu
Oh, it's here
Bibim naengmyeon goes well with pork skin
(Prefer mul naengmyeon) But I want mul naengmyeon
(Bibim naengmyeon + broth!) Can I get bibim naengmyeon and broth on the side...?
I'll grill the pork skin for you!
(Put on the grill)
(Chewy skin)
We boil the skin!
Oh boil?
(Thick pork skin that's been boiled without any unpleasant smell) It's so thick! So thick!
(Bibim naengmyeon is here) Thank you

(Ready) Enjoy
(Ready) Thank you
(Can't miss out on naengmyeon as dessert) I love this type of noodles too
(after eating meat) I don't like those really thin or thick noodles
Oh these noodles...
They're amazing!
(The broth is a hit!) The broth is so good
I'll try the pork skin
Amazing
It's chewy on the outside
But the inside...
it's soft!
Pork skin with bibim naengmyeon together
The pork skin is so good!
So delicious
It's even better than restaurants that specialize in pork skin

The skin and mul naengmyeon go so well together
(Made it into mul naengmyeon at the end) Can you put broth in here like mul naengmyeon?
(Fulfilled her wish) Thank you
(Mul naengmyeon is the best) I love mul naengmyeon
The skin is super hot
If I put it in the mul naengmyeon,
it becomes the perfect temperature and make it more flavorful
Ah, it's so...
delicious today
Ah, you gotta eat naengmyeon during the summer
(Done) Ah, my teeth
I came to 'Majangdong Kimssi' today
(Got to experience) I ate meat and other sides
(delicious spotted pig) I think this was the most satisfying
I don't know who Majangdong Kimssi is
but that person is amazing

There's an event
(Instagram event) at Majangdong Kimssi
('Majangdong Kimssi' reels challenge) It says it's a challenge
(How to participate) If you come here and take a video
(Upload a reel) and upload it on Instagram,
(A total of 2 million won in prize money!) there is prize money for 1st, 2nd place
(Refer to the description below for details!) The first 1,000 people will get Americanos
Anyway!
I had a great meal today
